item.title: Cell Phone Data Recovery [Utilities]
item.itunes:title: Cell Phone Data Recovery [Utilities]
item.itunes:author: mobiledatarecovery1
item.itunes:summary:
Cell Phone Data Recovery
(Utilities)
Cell Phone Data Recovery tool regain lost jpg. Cell Phone Data Recovery program swiftly restores each corrupted multimedia file. Cell Phone Data Recovery software has no side effect on previously stored original records since utility is readable only. Cell Phone Data Recovery application maintains integrated advanced phone memory seeking mechanism to obtain each mislaid file. Deleted data recovery utility for mobile phone exploits some standard searching algorithms to restore totally ruined multimedia records. Cell Phone Data Recovery software revives fully misplaced mp3 or mp4 clips and marvelous photos in uncomplicated strategy after attaching with your personal computer. Remarkable data retrieval application for mobile phone salvages virus infected videos or text files in negligible efforts and graceful technique.

[read more]

item.title: Click Radio [Audioplayers]
item.itunes:title: Click Radio [Audioplayers]
item.itunes:author: Upgreyed
item.itunes:summary:
Click Radio
(Audioplayers)
Click Radio is lightweight and simple gui interface media app
project of mine as to be very easy to use.
Click and play features:
* Music radio streamer
* Streamripper recorder
* Plays local music files
* Creates a music playlist
* CD-ROM music player
* CD-R music burner
* Youtube media downloader

Tested and works on MATE, Cinnamon, Budgie, KDE Plasma, and XFCE desktop
Will not work on or show notification menu on Gnome3 desktop

[read more]

(Audioplayers)

[read more]
item.content:encoded:
Click Radio
(Audioplayers)
Click Radio is lightweight and simple gui interface media app
project of mine as to be very easy to use.
Click and play features:
* Music radio streamer
* Streamripper recorder
* Plays local music files
* Creates a music playlist
* CD-ROM music player
* CD-R music burner
* Youtube media downloader

Tested and works on MATE, Cinnamon, Budgie, KDE Plasma, and XFCE desktop
Will not work on or show notification menu on Gnome3 desktop

[read more]

item.title: RosarioSIS [Education Apps]
item.itunes:title: RosarioSIS [Education Apps]
item.itunes:author: francoisj
item.itunes:summary:
RosarioSIS
(Education Apps)
RosarioSIS is a Student Information System designed for school management and communication.
It runs in the browser as a web application powered by PHP/SQL.
Main modules are: School, Students, Users, Scheduling, Grades, Attendance, Discipline, Food Service and Student Billing.
Numerous add-ons (modules, plugins and themes) are available. For example: Email, SMS, Messaging, Library, Hostel, Inventory, Students Import...
RosarioSIS features a responsive interface, multilingual support, PDF reports, list export to Excel, colorful statistical charts, online student registration.
A demo is available on the official website.
[read more]
item.description:
RosarioSIS
(Education Apps)
RosarioSIS is a Student Information System designed for school management and communication.
It runs in the browser as a web application powered by PHP/SQL.
Main modules are: School, Students, Users, Scheduling, Grades, Attendance, Discipline, Food Service and Student Billing.
Numerous add-ons (modules, plugins and themes) are available. For example: Email, SMS, Messaging, Library, Hostel, Inventory, Students Import...
RosarioSIS features a responsive interface, multilingual support, PDF reports, list export to Excel, colorful statistical charts, online student registration.
A demo is available on the official website.
[read more]
item.content:encoded:
RosarioSIS
(Education Apps)
RosarioSIS is a Student Information System designed for school management and communication.
It runs in the browser as a web application powered by PHP/SQL.
Main modules are: School, Students, Users, Scheduling, Grades, Attendance, Discipline, Food Service and Student Billing.
Numerous add-ons (modules, plugins and themes) are available. For example: Email, SMS, Messaging, Library, Hostel, Inventory, Students Import...
RosarioSIS features a responsive interface, multilingual support, PDF reports, list export to Excel, colorful statistical charts, online student registration.
A demo is available on the official website.
[read more]

item.title: sysi [System Monitoring]
item.itunes:title: sysi [System Monitoring]
item.itunes:author: djmaxcz
item.itunes:summary:
sysi
(System Monitoring)
updates will be delay 1-2 days or more i have bad memory and i am lazy please wait before hate
SYSI is a powerful and user-friendly terminal application designed to provide a comprehensive overview of your system's health and status. sysi displays vital system information, inspirational quotes, humorous jokes, and fun facts, all within a visually appealing, color-coded, text-based interface.

Centralized and Concise System Information:
Memory and Swap Usage: Displays current memory and swap usage with percentages.

CPU Details: Shows CPU model, cores, threads, and temperature if available.

GPU Information: Includes GPU model and temperature (with support for Nvidia, AMD, and Intel GPUs if lm_sensors is installed).

Disk Usage: Provides an overview of disk usage, including mounted drives.

Battery Status: Shows battery state, percentage, and time to full charge.

Network Interfaces: Optionally display detailed network interface information.

System Uptime and Time: Displays the system uptime and current time.

Color-Coded Text:

The script utilizes ANSI escape codes to display color-coded text, enhancing readability and making important information stand out.

Inspirational Quotes, Humor and fun facts:

Random Quote: Displays a random inspirational or insightful quote about programming or technology.

Programming Jokes: Adds a touch of humor by displaying a random programming-related joke.

Shares a random fun fact related to technology or computing.

and more

md5 checksum
sysi-debian.tar.gz 3de8e740f70ada2677172acdcb48c39d


sysi-1.0.9.tar.gz 75bc08d32b9122d08e419d409c7d76ac


sysi-1.0.9.zip 1085f5b6f66eb82023c4c487b5a4fab3


sysi-cz.tar.gz a44bf12ff5f903584623c890c9329ede


sysi-1.0.3.zip ea3a93990ccb6e7aebd35d285537c4ff


sysi-1.0.3.tar.gz a0c3c8ca90b3158092f418aa8c63ec06


sysi.tar.gz 9df33cf1fb301c36cfd28baadcf8b9bf


[read more]

sysi
(System Monitoring)

SYSI is a powerful and user-friendly terminal application designed to provide a comprehensive overview of your system's health and status. sysi displays vital system information, inspirational quotes, humorous jokes, and fun facts, all within a visually appealing, color-coded, text-based interface.

Centralized and Concise System Information:
Memory and Swap Usage: Displays current memory and swap usage with percentages.

CPU Details: Shows CPU model, cores, threads, and temperature if available.

Disk Usage: Provides an overview of disk usage, including mounted drives.

Battery Status: Shows battery state, percentage, and time to full charge.

Network Interfaces: Optionally display detailed network interface information.

System Uptime and Time: Displays the system uptime and current time.

The script utilizes ANSI escape codes to display color-coded text, enhancing readability and making important information stand out.

item.content:encoded:
sysi
(System Monitoring)
updates will be delay 1-2 days or more i have bad memory and i am lazy please wait before hate
SYSI is a powerful and user-friendly terminal application designed to provide a comprehensive overview of your system's health and status. sysi displays vital system information, inspirational quotes, humorous jokes, and fun facts, all within a visually appealing, color-coded, text-based interface.

Centralized and Concise System Information:
Memory and Swap Usage: Displays current memory and swap usage with percentages.

CPU Details: Shows CPU model, cores, threads, and temperature if available.

GPU Information: Includes GPU model and temperature (with support for Nvidia, AMD, and Intel GPUs if lm_sensors is installed).

Disk Usage: Provides an overview of disk usage, including mounted drives.

Battery Status: Shows battery state, percentage, and time to full charge.

Network Interfaces: Optionally display detailed network interface information.

System Uptime and Time: Displays the system uptime and current time.

Color-Coded Text:

The script utilizes ANSI escape codes to display color-coded text, enhancing readability and making important information stand out.

Inspirational Quotes, Humor and fun facts:

Random Quote: Displays a random inspirational or insightful quote about programming or technology.

Programming Jokes: Adds a touch of humor by displaying a random programming-related joke.

Shares a random fun fact related to technology or computing.

item.title: iQPuzzle [Various Games]
item.itunes:title: iQPuzzle [Various Games]
item.itunes:author: ElThoro
item.itunes:summary:
iQPuzzle
(Various Games)
iQPuzzle is a diverting I.Q. challenging puzzle. Pentominos are used as puzzle pieces and more than 350 different board shapes are available, which have to be filled with them.
[list]
[*] [url=https://github.com/ElTh0r0/iqpuzzle/releases/latest]Windows, AppImage, ReactOS, macOS[/url]
[*] [url=https://flathub.org/apps/details/com.github.elth0r0.iqpuzzle]Flatpak[/url]
[*] [url=https://launchpad.net/~elthoro/+archive/iqpuzzle]Ubuntu PPA[/url]
[*] [url=https://software.opensuse.org/download.html?project=home%3AElThoro&package=iqpuzzle]Builds for Cent OS, Debian, Fedora, openSUSE, SLE[/url]
[*] [url=https://aur.archlinux.org/packages/iqpuzzle/]Arch AUR[/url]
[*] [url=https://madb.mageia.org/package/show/name/iqpuzzle/release/cauldron/application/0]Mageia Cauldron[/url]
[*] [url=http://www.ecsoft2.org/iqpuzzle]Build for OS/2[/url]
[*] [url=https://github.com/mrbitt/mrbit-overlay/tree/master/games-puzzle/iqpuzzle]Gentoo ebuild[/url]
[*] [url=https://www.freshports.org/games/iqpuzzle]FreeBSD Ports[/url] / [url=https://repology.org/repository/dports]DPorts[/url]
[/list]
Note: The [b]macOS[/b] release was created automatically on a build server and is untested due to missing soft-/hardware! If you are facing any trouble, please create an issue on [url=https://github.com/ElTh0r0/iqpuzzle/issues]GitHub[/url] or post a comment here.
[read more]
item.description:
iQPuzzle
(Various Games)
iQPuzzle is a diverting I.Q. challenging puzzle. Pentominos are used as puzzle pieces and more than 350 different board shapes are available, which have to be filled with them.

[/list]
Note: The [b]macOS[/b] release was created automatically on a build server and is untested due to missing soft-/hardware! If you are facing any trouble, please create an issue on [url=https://github.com/ElTh0r0/iqpuzzle/issues]GitHub[/url] or post a comment here.
[read more]
item.content:encoded:
iQPuzzle
(Various Games)
iQPuzzle is a diverting I.Q. challenging puzzle. Pentominos are used as puzzle pieces and more than 350 different board shapes are available, which have to be filled with them.
[list]
[*] [url=https://github.com/ElTh0r0/iqpuzzle/releases/latest]Windows, AppImage, ReactOS, macOS[/url]
[*] [url=https://flathub.org/apps/details/com.github.elth0r0.iqpuzzle]Flatpak[/url]
[*] [url=https://launchpad.net/~elthoro/+archive/iqpuzzle]Ubuntu PPA[/url]
[*] [url=https://software.opensuse.org/download.html?project=home%3AElThoro&package=iqpuzzle]Builds for Cent OS, Debian, Fedora, openSUSE, SLE[/url]
[*] [url=https://aur.archlinux.org/packages/iqpuzzle/]Arch AUR[/url]
[*] [url=https://madb.mageia.org/package/show/name/iqpuzzle/release/cauldron/application/0]Mageia Cauldron[/url]
[*] [url=http://www.ecsoft2.org/iqpuzzle]Build for OS/2[/url]
[*] [url=https://github.com/mrbitt/mrbit-overlay/tree/master/games-puzzle/iqpuzzle]Gentoo ebuild[/url]
[*] [url=https://www.freshports.org/games/iqpuzzle]FreeBSD Ports[/url] / [url=https://repology.org/repository/dports]DPorts[/url]
[/list]
Note: The [b]macOS[/b] release was created automatically on a build server and is untested due to missing soft-/hardware! If you are facing any trouble, please create an issue on [url=https://github.com/ElTh0r0/iqpuzzle/issues]GitHub[/url] or post a comment here.

item.title: eric [IDEs]
item.itunes:title: eric [IDEs]
item.itunes:author: detlev
item.itunes:summary:
eric
(IDEs)
Eric is a Python IDE written using PyQt6 and QScintilla2. It has integrated project management capabilities, it gives you an unlimited number of editors, an integrated Python shell, an integrated debugger, integrated interfaces to Mercurial, Git and Subversion, integrated unittest and much more. It is extensible via an integrated plug-in system.
Eric requires Python 3 as a runtime environment.

It is available through the eric website at "http://eric-ide.python-projects.org".
[read more]
item.description:
eric
(IDEs)
Eric is a Python IDE written using PyQt6 and QScintilla2. It has integrated project management capabilities, it gives you an unlimited number of editors, an integrated Python shell, an integrated debugger, integrated interfaces to Mercurial, Git and Subversion, integrated unittest and much more. It is extensible via an integrated plug-in system.
Eric requires Python 3 as a runtime environment.

It is available through the eric website at "http://eric-ide.python-projects.org".
[read more]
item.content:encoded:
eric
(IDEs)
Eric is a Python IDE written using PyQt6 and QScintilla2. It has integrated project management capabilities, it gives you an unlimited number of editors, an integrated Python shell, an integrated debugger, integrated interfaces to Mercurial, Git and Subversion, integrated unittest and much more. It is extensible via an integrated plug-in system.
Eric requires Python 3 as a runtime environment.

It is available through the eric website at "http://eric-ide.python-projects.org".
[read more]

item.title: Android Pictures Recovery Software [Utilities]
item.itunes:title: Android Pictures Recovery Software [Utilities]
item.itunes:author: mobiledatarecovery1
item.itunes:summary:
Android Pictures Recovery Software
(Utilities)
Android Recovery tool restore lost data files. Android Pictures Recovery Software restores corrupted files from smart phones. Website www.cellpdasim.comv provides Android Pictures Recovery Software for users to easily restore their erased or corrupted files and folders from major mobile devices in few seconds. Trying to regain permanently deleted data and files from cell phones? Effective Android Pictures Recovery Software developed by expert engineers can be downloaded from www.cellpdasim.com to help you in retrieving your missing or lost audio, video, images and pictures from smart phones. Reliable and economical data recovery software has user friendly interface for users to easily use the tool for restoring their damaged media without experts helpInnovative Android Pictures Recovery Software is easily available at www.cellpdasim.com to help people in regaining their damaged audio and video files lost due to improper handling of device, virus attack and other major data loss conditions.

[read more]
